Lawrence County Voter and Elections Services
Home
>
Government
> Voter and Election Office
Welcome to Voter and Election Services
2026 Election Results
This office manages all aspects of the election and voter registration process for Lawrence County.  Public services include: registering to vote, updating voting records, applying for an absentee ballot, filing a petition for public office, filing a campaign expense report, and obtaining election results.
Upcoming Election
Nov. 3, 2026 - General Election
Polls are open on election day from
7 A.M. to 8 P.M.
Last day to register to vote:
Oct.19
, 2026
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot:
Oct.
27, 2026
